summary: Frontend-only testing of three new employee dashboard pages: Einstellungen (Settings), Dokumente (Documents), and Auszahlung (Payout). All pages load correctly, navigation works, buttons functional, mock data displays properly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - expected as pages use mock data/localStorage

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span>. This is a development-time warning from React StrictMode about invalid HTML nesting, appears to be from build tooling wrapper elements.

critical_code_review_comments: All three pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Profile save, password change, notification toggles in Einstellungen all work correctly
Document category filtering, preview modal, upload button all work in Dokumente
Payout request, bank data save, history table all work in Auszahlung
Sidebar navigation correctly highlights active page
All pages use localStorage for employee data as documented (MOCK data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new employee pages fully tested: MitarbeiterEinstellungen (/mitarbeiter/einstellungen), MitarbeiterDokumente (/mitarbeiter/dokumente), MitarbeiterAuszahlung (/mitarbeiter/auszahlung). All use mock data - document list, payout history, profile save all simulated. Backend integration can be added later.

einstellungen_page: Profile section with name, email (read-only), phone, position, address - PASS
Phone and address fields editable - PASS
Save button ('Änderungen speichern') works, shows success toast - PASS
Password change section with current/new/confirm fields - PASS
dokumente_page: Document count display ('4 Dokument(e) gespeichert') - PASS
6 category filters (Alle, Verträge, Gehaltsabrechnungen, Steuer, Versicherungen, Sonstige) - PASS
4 document cards with status badges (Bestätigt, In Prüfung) - PASS
Document actions (Ansehen, Download, Delete for pending) - PASS
auszahlung_page: 4 stats cards (Aktuelles Guthaben, Ausstehend, Letzte Auszahlung, Gesamteinnahmen) - PASS
Quick payout section with request button - PASS
Payout request button works, shows toast - PASS
Bank details form (Kontoinhaber, Bank, IBAN, BIC) - PASS
Bank save button works, shows toast - PASS
Payout history table with 3 rows - PASS
Info box with payout rules - PASS
navigation: Active page highlighted in sidebar - PASS
